name: MicroStudio service catalog
description: Fixed-scope technical delivery with synthetic proof, explicit acceptance criteria and privacy-safe public inquiry briefs.

inquiry.notice: An inquiry is not an order. Scope, amount, fees, payment, acceptance, revisions, cancellation and rights must be confirmed in writing before work starts.

eligibility.relationship_unknown: ineligible until organizer, client, sponsor, evaluator and payer are reliably confirmed private and non-official

privacy: Use synthetic or sanitized samples. Do not send credentials, cookies, API keys, identity or payment records, live-account access, or unnecessary customer data.

technical_previews.name: Catalog QA Offline Agency Kit
technical_previews.decision_ready_output: Shopify draft import, quarantine, field map and deterministic reconciliation receipt
technical_previews.evidence: Private synthetic Cloud smoke plus local SDK proof

technical_previews.name: Commerce Reconciliation
technical_previews.owned_input: Sanitized orders, fulfillments, optional refunds and inventory exports
technical_previews.decision_ready_output: Deterministic four-ledger exception evidence, control counts, hashes and receipt
technical_previews.evidence: Two local synthetic fixtures with deterministic invariants and zero network calls

technical_previews.name: Procurement Document Reconciliation
technical_previews.owned_input: One redacted, fixed-template purchase order, commercial invoice and packing list
technical_previews.decision_ready_output: Traceable ERP staging rows, stable cross-document exceptions, source lines, control totals and receipt
technical_previews.evidence: Two local synthetic document packs with deterministic invariants and zero network or OCR calls

technical_previews.name: Amazon Settlement V2 Reconciliation
technical_previews.owned_input: One seller-authorized, sanitized Amazon Flat File V2 settlement export plus an optional three-column expected-payout control
technical_previews.decision_ready_output: Aggregate settlement summaries, amount controls, stable exceptions, field mapping, source-row evidence and deterministic receipt
different_from: public Amazon product, seller, review, price or ranking scraper
technical_previews.evidence: Two local synthetic fixtures, 24 of 24 product tests and cached Actor integration verification with zero external calls

offers.name: Evidence contract and AI output QA
